samplePacks.usage: primary bass synth in Ghosts and L'or Bleu

samplePacks.name: ghost
samplePacks.usage: namesake haunted samples cycled through 4 variations

samplePacks.name: punk
samplePacks.usage: punk guitar chops in Nouveau Punk

samplePacks.name: meth_bass
samplePacks.usage: dub-delay bass slices in Pitbul Punk

samplePacks.name: 90s_synatm

samplePacks.name: suns_keys / suns_guitar

ingredients.description: 160 BPM, fast DNB-adjacent tempo
Ghost samples cycling through 4 variations — the track's namesake
Breakbeat slicer on breaks165 with variable resequencing
Heavy octave sub-bass doubling with tight reverb
Dark Warsaw bass with diminished/augmented interval cycle
155 BPM — punk energy territory
Punk guitar chopped with MIDI-controlled bitcrush
High-passed meth_bass following E-G-A-B progression
Euclidean-rhythmed arpeggiated 'Violoncelle Manouche punko-magique'
Triple MIDI-controlled destruction on 90s_synatm synth
170 BPM — full DNB speed, fastest track
Acid bassline with variable-density note patterns
Layered acid superimposition with MIDI gain crossfade
Meth bass with building dub-delay wash (0 to 0.8 feedback)

ingredients.code: note "<a as <a a df5 df5> <d df>>" # "moog"
ingredients.description: Moog lead with chromatic A-A#-A/Db-D progression
135 BPM acid techno groove
Triple-layered acid bass stack: vec2 alternating + two vec1 lines
Acid sequence with octave drop every 32 cycles

ingredients.code: note ("b ~ ~ b ~ ~ <d!7 e6> <~ d>") # "FMRhodes1" # tremdp 4 # tremr 1.8
ingredients.description: FM Rhodes 'Piano lead acidulé' with tremolo droplet texture
Caring bass — Moog with chromatic C-C#-A movement
124 BPM — slowest, most melodic track
Suns of Gold keyboard stabs with tremolo and euclidean slicing
Polymetric (4/3) Warsaw bass — triplets against 4/4 grid
Euclidean-sliced guitar with lush reverb and L/R panning
'CRASH/BURN THIS GUITAR' — MIDI-driven total destruction
